App.Title: Wayfinder
App.Subtitle: Guided PF2E creation and level-up
App.NoPending: No Wayfinder-guided steps are pending. PF2E-native or manual choices may still live on the character sheet.
App.Guidance: Wayfinder handles the picks — ancestry, feats, class branches, spells. Ability boosts and skill increases are walked through here too. Anything Wayfinder can't model cleanly hands off to your character sheet.

ExtraPacks.Name: Extra PF2E compendium allowlist
ExtraPacks.Hint: Comma-separated compendium ids to search in addition to the official PF2E packs, for example world.homebrew-feats,my-module.custom-options.

Notifications.OwnerOnly: Only the character's owner can use Wayfinder on this sheet.
Notifications.MissingSelections: Finish the remaining steps before applying.
Notifications.NoPendingSteps: There are no Wayfinder-guided steps to apply. Check the PF2E sheet for any native or manual choices.
Notifications.DuplicateSelections: You can't pick the same option twice in one draft.
Notifications.ApplyCancelled: Apply cancelled — your draft is still here.
Notifications.ApplyFailed: Couldn't apply the changes. Your draft is intact — review and try again.
